name: GH_Interpolation
summary: Enumerates the possible animation progression types.

enum_values.name: NearestNeighbour
enum_values.summary: Animation interpolation is either equal to A or B, whichever is closest.

enum_values.name: Linear
enum_values.summary: Linear interpolation between A and B.

enum_values.name: EaseIn
enum_values.summary: Interpolation that has a derivative of zero at the start.

enum_values.name: EaseOut
enum_values.summary: Inteprolation that has a derivative of zero at the end.

enum_values.name: EaseInAndOut
enum_values.summary: Interpolation that has a derivative of zero at both ends.
